623 Sequachee Industrial Park Dr, Dunlap, TN 37327, USA
This is the end of the road into the local industrial park. This large blackberry patch should be available until more industry moves in. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: June-July.

Muscadine vine is high in the tree on the northeast side of the road, and during the season the grapes fall along the roadside and onto the pavement. Access: Private but overhanging. Falling Fruit season: September-September.
Falling Fruit access: Private but overhanging.
662 Old Union Rd, Dunlap, TN 37327, USA

North corner of Old Union Rd. and Finley Rd. Tree is probably over 40 feet high, and stands behind another hardwood (oak?) about 10 feet off Old Union Rd. Access: Private but overhanging. Falling Fruit season: September-November.
Falling Fruit access: Private but overhanging.
